'''âm-h-j-j''' ('''kamahjejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobble|hobble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobble|hobble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-h-j-j
|-
! Lemma
| kamahjejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimahjejoko|thimahjejoko]] || [[word:jimahjejoko|jimahjejoko]] || [[word:shimahjejoko|shimahjejoko]] || [[word:kimahjejoko|kimahjejoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
